guildWire.tagline: What builders, learners, and mentors are shipping across every field — curated for a global community.

stories.title: Production RAG stack shipped to 2M users after 6-week guild sprint
stories.dek: A cross-functional crew of students and senior engineers paired through the community to replace a brittle keyword search with a grounded retrieval pipeline.
stories.author: Nadia Okafor
stories.takeaway: Eval harnesses written before feature code cut rollback incidents by 70%. The guild paired 3 students with 2 staff engineers for weekly architecture reviews.

stories.title: FHIR bootcamp graduates first clinician-coders cohort
stories.dek: 12 nurses and physicians shipped sandbox apps pulling real EHR test data — zero prior backend experience required.
stories.author: Dr. Raj Mehta
stories.takeaway: Pairing each clinician with one backend mentor for 4 weeks outperformed self-paced video courses on completion rate.

stories.title: Open payments sandbox hits 10K sandbox transactions
stories.dek: Community-maintained API mocks now cover UPI, SEPA, and ACH — built by contributors across 22 countries.
stories.author: Lucas Ferreira
stories.takeaway: Microfinance operators in Kenya and Brazil contributed the most edge-case test fixtures.

stories.title: 4,200 mentor matches made this week
stories.dek: Career switchers matched with practitioners in 48 verticals.
stories.author: Guild Desk
stories.takeaway: EdTech and CyberSecurity saw the highest first-session retention.

stories.title: Indie studio open-sources lag-compensation library
stories.dek: Rollback netcode module tested on 800-player stress servers — docs written for first-time multiplayer devs.
stories.author: Pixel Forge
stories.takeaway: Three computer-science students contributed the tutorial series that drove 80% of GitHub stars.

stories.title: Grid forecast API documentation rewrite
stories.dek: Field operators and data engineers co-authored plain-language guides.
stories.author: CleanGrid Co-op

stories.title: Claims automation study group fills 200 seats in 3 hours
stories.dek: Actuaries and full-stack devs learning policy-engine design together.
stories.author: Sana K.

stories.title: D2C brand shares attribution playbook publicly
stories.dek: Bootstrapped skincare label documents their MarTech stack for community peer review.
stories.author: Mira Chen
stories.takeaway: Students studying digital marketing used the playbook as a semester case study at 14 universities.

stories.title: Clause extraction model benchmark published
stories.dek: Attorneys and NLP engineers jointly scored 6 open models on contract redlines.
stories.author: Access Justice Lab

stories.title: Satellite + soil sensor guild forms cross-border coop
stories.dek: Farmers in India and Mexico share crop-model notebooks with CS grad students.
stories.author: Field Data Union
stories.takeaway: First shared dataset released under CC-BY for university research labs.

stories.title: Live caption plugin reaches WCAG AAA
stories.dek: Streamers with hearing disabilities led the accessibility audit.
stories.author: CaptionKit

stories.title: Skills-graph primer downloaded 50K times
stories.dek: People ops teams and engineers co-wrote the internal mobility playbook.
stories.author: People Analytics Guild
stories.takeaway: Professionals aged 35–50 were the fastest-growing reader segment this quarter.

stories.title: Purple-team tabletop draws 1,800 live participants
stories.dek: Incident-response scenario run simultaneously across 6 time zones.
stories.author: IR Guild

stories.title: Lease automation templates localized to 9 languages
stories.dek: Real-estate ops managers and developers contributed regional compliance variants.
stories.author: Urban Stack
